maay_maay.strong_dipole_field_from_liquid_iron_o: Beer dipole xoog leh oo ka timid xudunta dibedda ee bir dareere ah. Waxay abuurtaa Van Allen belts. Waa lagama maarmaan nolosha!
maay_maay.lost_its_global_field_4_billion_years_: Beertiisii guud wuxuu lumiyay ~4 bilyan sano ka hor. Birlab hadhaagii wuxuu ku hadhay diirka duqowday.

maay_maay.too_small_and_cold_for_a_dynamo_no_pro: Aad buu u yar yahay oo u qabow yahay si uu dynamo u sameeyo. Dabaysha qorraxda kama celiyo.

maay_maay.saturn_has_146_known_moons_as_of_2024: Saturn wuxuu leeyahay 293 dayax oo la yaqaan liiska dayax-gacmeedyada planet-yada ee JPL ee hadda jira.
maay_maay.mercury_is_only_4_879_km_in_diameter: Mercury dhexroorkiisu waa 4,879 km oo keliya.
maay_maay.pluto_takes_248_earth_years_to_orbit_t: Pluto wuxuu qaataa 248 sano oo Dhul ah inuu Qorraxda ku wareego!
maay_maay.jupiter_rotates_in_just_10_hours: Jupiter wuxuu ku wareegaa 10 saacadood oo keliya!
maay_maay.iron_oxide_rust_gives_mars_its_red_col: Iron oxide (miridh) ayaa Mars siiya midabka guduudan.
maay_maay.saturn_s_density_is_less_than_water_0_: Culayska Saturn wuu ka yar yahay kan biyaha (0.687 g/cm³)!
maay_maay.olympus_mons_on_mars_is_21_9_km_high_n: Olympus Mons ee Mars waa 21.9 km sarreeya — ku dhow 3 jeer Everest!
maay_maay.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_charge: Beerta birlabeed ee Dhulka waxay iska celisaa walxaha qorraxda ee charged ah. Ozone-ku wuxuu ka caawiyaa UV, laakiin magnetosphere-ka ayaa gaashaanka koowaad ah!
maay_maay.the_iau_s_2006_definition_requires_pla: Qeexitaanka IAU ee 2006 wuxuu doonayaa in planet-yadu nadiifiyaan aagga wareeggooda walxaha kale.
maay_maay.also_called_the_goldilocks_zone_not_to: Sidoo kale waxaa la yiraahdaa "Goldilocks zone" — kulayl badan iyo qabow badan midna ma leh, si biyuhu dusha ugu sii dareere ahaadaan.
maay_maay.the_moon_rotates_exactly_once_per_orbi: Dayaxu wuxuu ku wareegaa hal mar wareeg kasta — isku-xirnaantan waxaa keenay xoogagga mawjadaha bilyanaan sano.
maay_maay.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover-ka Opportunity wuxuu helay "blueberries" hematite ah — macdano keliya biyaha ku samaysma. Sawirrada hawada waxay muujinayaan delta webi hore!
maay_maay.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus way ka kulul tahay (462°C oo la barbardhigo 430°C)! Mercury hawo ma laha oo kulaylka qabata. Greenhouse effect-ku wuu ka muhiimsan yahay masaafada.
maay_maay.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Gas giant-yadu dus adag ma laha! Waxay inta badan yihiin gaas hydrogen iyo helium ah oo si tartiib ah u sii culaysanaya xudunta xaggeeda. Probe wuu sii degi lahaa weligiis.
maay_maay.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Masaafada Dhulka ee Qorraxda kama beddelanto maalintii. Duhurku wuxuu keliya ka dhigan yahay in Qorraxdu cirkaaga ugu sarrayso. Dhulku wuxuu ugu dhow yahay Janaayo (perihelion)!
maay_maay.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter wuxuu 11 jeer ka ballaadhan yahay Dhulka, 1,300 Dhul ayaana gudihiisa geli kara! Nidaamka qorraxdu wuxuu leeyahay kala duwanaansho cabbir oo xad-dhaaf ah.
maay_maay.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto wali wuxuu ku jiraa nidaamka qorraxda! Waxaa laga beddelay "planet" oo la dhigay "dwarf planet" 2006, laakiin wali Qorraxduu ku wareegaa.
maay_maay.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Suunka asteroid-ka inta badan waa meel bannaan! Masaafada celceliska ah ee u dhaxaysa asteroid-yada waa malaayiin km. Dayax-gacmeedyadu way dhex maraan iyagoo aan khatar la kulmin.
maay_maay.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Mar walba maya! Saturn wuxuu 95 jeer ka cuf badan yahay Dhulka laakiin gravity-ga dusha waa 1.06g oo keliya sababtoo ah aad buu u weyn yahay culayskiisuna hooseeyaa. Miisaanku wuxuu ku xiran yahay cufka IYO dhexroorka.
maay_maay.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Qeybaha Dayaxa oo dhan waxay helaan iftiinka qorraxda! "Dhinaca fog" waa uun badhka aynaan Dhulka ka arki karin tidal locking darteed. Qorrax isla mid ah ayuu helaa.
maay_maay.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Aagga nolosha (ama "Goldilocks zone") waa xadka masaafada xiddig laga bilaabo halka biyo dareere ah ay dusha planet-ka ku jiri karaan. Nidaamkeenna qorraxda, Venus waxay ku taal cidhifka gudaha, Dhulku wuxuu ku yaal bartamaha, Mars-na wuxuu ku yaal cidhifka dibedda. Laakiin haynta biyo dareere ah waxay sidoo kale u baahan tahay hawo iyo beer birlabeed sax ah!
maay_maay.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Marka iftiinka qorraxdu kululeeyo dusha planet-ka, dushu waxay soo celisaa kulayl (infrared). Gaasaska greenhouse (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) way nuugaan kulaylkan oo dib bay u soo celiyaan, taasoo planet-ka kululaysa. Greenhouse-ka Dhulku waa +33°C (nolosha wuu sii wadaa). Kan Venus waa +510°C (lama joojin karo). Mars ku dhowaad ma laha (-60°C celcelis). Tirada gaaska greenhouse ayaa go'aamisa natiijada!
maay_maay.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Beerta birlabeed ee planet waxay abuurtaa "magnetosphere" — gaashaan aan la arki karin oo iska celiya dabaysha qorraxda (walxo charged ah oo Qorraxda ka yimid). Magnetosphere-ka Dhulku wuxuu ilaaliyaa hawadeenna wuxuuna suurtogeliyaa nolosha. Mars wuxuu beertiisii birlabeed lumiyay 4 bilyan sano ka hor, hawadiisiina si tartiib ah ayaa loo siibay. Magnetosphere-ka Jupiter wuu 20,000 jeer ka xoog badan yahay kan Dhulka!
maay_maay.why_isn_t_pluto_a_planet: Maxay Pluto Planet u Aanay Ahayn?
maay_maay.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: 2006-dii, International Astronomical Union waxay qeexday saddex shuruudood oo planet: (1) Qorraxda ayuu ku wareegaa ✓, (2) Wuxuu leeyahay cuf ku filan oo qaab wareegsan ✓, (3) Wuxuu "nadiifiyay wareeggiisa" walxaha kale ✗. Pluto wuxuu aagga wareeggiisa la wadaagaa kumanaan walxo Kuiper Belt ah, sidaas darteed waxaa loo kala saaray "dwarf planet." Taasi kama dhigayso mid aan xiiso lahayn — New Horizons wuxuu muujiyay inuu firfircoon yahay!
maay_maay.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: Bilyanaan sano gudahood, xoogagga mawjadaha ee gravity waxay hoos u dhigi karaan wareegga dayax ilaa uu la mid noqdo muddadiisa wareegga. Natiijo: hal wejiga ayaa had iyo jeer planet-ka u jeeda. Dayaxeennu wuxuu Dhulka ku xiran yahay tidal locking. Mercury qayb ahaan buu Qorraxda ugu xiran yahay (saamiga 3:2). Pluto iyo Charon midba midka kale ayuu ku xiran yahay — had iyo jeer isla weji ayay is tusaan!
maay_maay.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Biosignature waa cadeyn kasta oo nolol hore ama hadda jirta ah. Saynisyahannadu waxay raadiyaan: (1) biyo dareere ah, (2) molecule organic ah, (3) gaasas hawada sida oksijiin ama methane oo aan jiri lahayn haddii nolol aanay soo saarin, (4) ilo tamareed. Meelaha ugu wanaagsan nidaamkeenna qorraxda: Mars (biyo hore), Europa (bad hoose), Enceladus (ilo biyo ah), iyo Titan (harooyin methane ah).
maay_maay.guided_tour_for_beginners_grades_3_5: Safar la hago oo bilowga ah (fasallada 3-5)

maay_maay.has_the_tallest_volcano_in_the_solar_s: Wuxuu leeyahay foolkaanaha ugu dheer nidaamka qorraxda: Olympus Mons (21.9 km sarreeya).

maay_maay.its_rings_are_made_of_ice_and_rock_cou: Giraangirihiisa waxaa laga sameeyay baraf iyo dhagax. Wuu ku dhex dabbaalan lahaa berkad weyn!

maay_maay.drag_the_alignment_slider_to_line_up_s: Jiid slider-ka toosinta si aad isku toosiso Qorraxda, Dayaxa, iyo Dhulka. Beddel qorrax-madoobaad iyo dayax-madoobaad.
maay_maay.adjust_solar_wind_latitude_and_altitud: Beddel dabaysha qorraxda, latitude, iyo joogga si aad aurora u habayso. Midabku wuxuu ku xiran yahay walxaha kiciya atomyada hawada ee kala duwan.
maay_maay.a_comet_gets_two_tails_when_it_nears_t: Comet wuxuu helaa laba dab marka uu Qorraxda u soo dhowaado. Beddel masaafada + xaggasha dabaysha si aad u aragto sida ay u samaysmaan.
maay_maay.curved_pushed_by_photon_radiation_pres: — qalloocan, waxaa riixa cadaadiska shucaaca photon-ka (gaabis)
maay_maay.straight_pushed_by_solar_wind_charged_: — toosan, waxaa riixa walxaha charged ah ee dabaysha qorraxda (dheereeya)
maay_maay.adjust_mass_and_spin_watch_the_event_h: Beddel cufka iyo wareegga. Daawo event horizon-ka oo koraya iyo accretion disk-ga oo jawaabaya. Wareeg culus wuxuu tuuraa jet cidhifeed.
maay_maay.black_hole_has_3_properties_mass_spin_: God madoow wuxuu leeyahay 3 astaamood: cuf, wareeg, charge. Event horizon-ku waa barta aan laga soo noqon — marka iftiinku ka gudbo, waxba ma baxsan karaan. Accretion disk-gu waa walxo gudaha u wareegaya, oo isku-xigxiggu kululeeyay ilaa malaayiin darajo. Godadka si dheereysa u wareega waxay tuuri karaan jet relativistic ah dhidibka wareegga.
maay_maay.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Jiid sanadaha Dhulka oo daawo shantii planet ee gudaha oo ku wareegaya xawaarahooda dhabta ah. Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler oo dhaqaaqaya.
maay_maay.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler: muddada wareegga oo la laba-jibbaaray ∝ masaafada oo saddex-jibbaaran. Planet-yada gudaha way ordaan; kuwa dibedda way gurguurtaan. Jupiter wuxuu qaataa 12 sano oo Dhul ah hal wareeg; Mercury wuxuu wareeg dhammeeyaa 88 maalmood kasta.
maay_maay.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Ka dhis dayax-gacmeed qaybo dhab ah. Dooro xudun, tamar, propulsion + xamuul — daawo cufka + qiimaha oo isku beddelaya.
maay_maay.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Qorraxdu waxay leedahay wareeg 11 sano ah oo firfircoonaanta sunspot-ka. Jiid si aad u aragto sunspot-yada oo imanaya oo baxaya + duulista CME.
maay_maay.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Qorraxdu waxay wareegtaa ~11 sano kasta inta u dhaxaysa ugu yaraan (sunspot yar, degganaan) iyo ugu badnaan (sunspot badan, solar flare + CME joogto ah). Wareegga 25 wuxuu gaadhay heerkiisii ugu sarreeyay agagaarka 2024-2025 hadduna wuu hoos u dhacayaa.
maay_maay.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Halkee ayay nolosha aan naqaan ku noolaan kartaa xiddig kasta? Beddel iftiinka xiddiga + masaafada planet-ka si aad u aragto.
maay_maay.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Aagga noloshu waa halka biyaha dushu ay dareere ku sii ahaan karaan. Cidhifka gudaha: greenhouse effect ayaa qallajiya. Cidhifka dibedda: barafku wuxuu qabtaa CO2, kadibna qabow aan la joojin karin. Cidhifyadu waxay u cabbirmaan sida √L.
maay_maay.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Jiid Dayaxa si uu u soo dhowaado si mawjadaha Dhulku u weynaadaan. Ogow in buurtu ay ka jirto labada dhinac — kan dhow iyo kan fog.
maay_maay.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Mawjaduhu waxay dhacaan sababtoo ah gravity-gu si xoog badan ayuu u jiidaa dhinaca dhow marka loo eego dhinaca fog ee Dhulka. Labada dhinacba way kor u buuraan. Qorraxda iyo Dayaxa oo isku jira waxay abuuraan mawjado weyn (marka ay toosan yihiin) + mawjado yaryar (marka ay is-dhaafsan yihiin).
maay_maay.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Wareeji Dhulka oo beddel xilliga. Daawo xariiqda maalin/habeen oo dhaqaaqaysa + janjeerta dhidibka oo beddelaysa badhka ay qorraxdu iftiimiso.
maay_maay.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Shan meelood oo gravity ahaan macaan oo u dhaxeeya laba jir halkaas oo dayax-gacmeedyadu ku taagnaan karaan. James Webb wuxuu fadhiyaa L2.
maay_maay.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Cagaar: deggan (L4, L5) • Jaale: aan deggenayn laakiin waxtar leh (L1, L2, L3)
maay_maay.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Shan bar oo ku jira wareeg laba-jir ah kasta halkaas oo gravity-ga iyo saameynta centrifugal ay isku dheelitiraan. Dayax-gacmeedyadu halkan ayay ku dhigan karaan shidaal aad u yar. JWST wuxuu fadhiyaa L2 — had iyo jeer Dhulka gadaashiisa, Qorraxdana ka fog.
maay_maay.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Element kastaa wuxuu iftiinka ku reebaa raad wavelength gaar ah. Wareeji element-yada si aad u aragto sida cirbixiyeennadu ugu garanayaan xiddigaha fog.
maay_maay.visible_light_continuum: Iftiinka la arki karo oo dhan
maay_maay.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Element kastaa wuxuu soo saaraa qaab u gaar ah oo wavelength iftiin ah — raadkiisa spectral. Marka aan eegno iftiinka xiddigaha fog, waan ogaan karnaa waxa laga sameeyay. Sidan ayaan ku ognahay in Qorraxdu tahay 75% hydrogen!
maay_maay.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Riix constellation-yada si aad u aragto xiddigahooda + xarriiqaha isku xira. Xiddig kastaa wuxuu leeyahay midabkiisa + magaciisa dhabta ah.
maay_maay.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Constellation-yadu waa qaabab xiddigo ah oo dhaqamadu kumanaan sano aqoonsanayeen. IAU waxay xaqiijisay 88 constellation rasmi ah sanadkii 1922. Xiddigaha ku jira constellation inta badan run ahaan isuma dhowa — waxay u muuqdaan kuwo dhow marka Dhulka laga eego.
maay_maay.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Immisa delta-v + wakhti safar ayaa loo baahan yahay in la gaadho meelo kala duwan? Wareegyada Hohmann transfer oo la muujiyay.
maay_maay.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Hohmann transfer waa habka shidaalka ugu badbaadiya ee lagu dhex guuro laba wareeg oo goobaabin ah. Wuxuu isticmaalaa laba gubasho: mid lagu galo ellipse-ka transfer-ka, mid lagu goobaabiyo meesha la doonayo. Δv waa wadarta isbeddelka xawaaraha ee loo baahan yahay.
maay_maay.pilot_a_rover_from_start_to_goal_plan_: Kaxee rover bilow ilaa bartilmaameed. Qorshee dhagxaanta iyo buuraha; ilaali shidaalkaaga!
maay_maay.drive_the_rover_from_start_to_goal_cos: Kaxee rover-ka bilow ilaa bartilmaameed. Qiimayaasha: dhul siman 1,
maay_maay.plan_the_path_to_conserve_fuel_like_re: Qorshee jidka si aad shidaalka u badbaadiso. Sida rover-yada dhabta ah ee Mars, mitir kastaa wuxuu u baahan yahay xisaab shidaal.
maay_maay.how_astronomers_measure_distance_each_: Sida cirbixiyeennadu masaafada u cabbiraan: hab kastaa wuxuu kan xiga u dhisayaa. Ka kor u fuul cabbirka Dhulka ilaa koonka la arki karo.
maay_maay.compared_sun_angle_in_two_cities_first: Waxaa la barbardhigay xaggasha qorraxda laba magaalo. Cabbirkii ugu horreeyay ee Dhulka.
maay_maay.hipparchus_150_bce_used_earth_s_shadow: Hipparchus (~150 BCE) wuxuu isticmaalay hooska Dhulka ee Dayaxa inta lagu jiro madoobaadka si uu masaafada u qiyaaso.
maay_maay.defines_the_astronomical_unit_modern_r: Wuxuu qeexayaa astronomical unit. Radar-ka casriga ah wuxuu saxan yahay ilaa mitirro.
maay_maay.kepler_s_third_law_distance_from_orbit: Sharciga saddexaad ee Kepler: masaafada laga helo muddada wareegga. Hadda dayax-gacmeedyo ayaa xaqiijiyay.
maay_maay.earth_s_orbit_gives_2_au_baseline_star: Wareegga Dhulku wuxuu bixiyaa saldhig 2 AU ah. Xiddigu wuxuu u muuqdaa mid xilli kasta dhaqaaqaya.
maay_maay.pulsation_period_reveals_true_brightne: Muddada garaaca ayaa muujisa dhalaalka dhabta ah. Barbardhig dhalaalka muuqda si aad masaafada u hesho.
maay_maay.same_cepheid_method_extended_to_other_: Isla habka Cepheid oo lagu fidiyay galaxy-yo kale. Hubble wuxuu 1923-dii muujiyay in Andromeda ay galaxy-deenna ka baxsan tahay.
maay_maay.more_distant_galaxies_are_receding_fas: Galaxy-yada aad u fog ayaa si dheereysa u sii fogaanaya. v = H × d ayaa masaafada bixisa.
maay_maay.cosmic_microwave_background_is_light_f: Cosmic Microwave Background waa iftiin ka yimid 13.8 bilyan sano ka hor, oo ballaadhintu fidisay.
maay_maay.light_from_receding_objects_redshifts_: Iftiinka walxaha sii fogaanaya wuxuu u guduudaa; kan soo dhowaanayana wuxuu u buluugaa. Sidan ayaan ku cabbirnaa masaafada koonka + ku ognahay in koonku ballaadhayo.
maay_maay.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Immisa iftiin qorrax ah oo planet ku soo dhaca ayaa dib u laalaabma marka loo eego kan la nuugo? Tani ayaa go'aamisa heerkulka guud.
maay_maay.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = qeybta iftiinka dib u laalaabma. Barafka + daruuruhu aad bay wax u laalaabaan (albedo sare); carrada madoow + biyuhu way nuugaan (albedo hoose). Laalaabid badan = planet qabow. Tani waa ice-albedo feedback-ga keena xilliyada barafka.
maay_maay.13_8_billion_years_compressed_into_a_s: 13.8 bilyan sano oo lagu soo koobay hal slider. Jiid singularity ilaa maanta.
maay_maay.spacetime_matter_compressed_to_a_point: Spacetime + walxaha oo hal bar loo cadaadiyay
maay_maay.universe_expands_by_10_in_a_fraction_o: Koonku wuxuu ballaadhay 10²⁶ jajab ilbiriqsi gudahood
maay_maay.quarks_bind_into_protons_and_neutrons: Quark-yadu waxay isku xirmeen proton iyo neutron
maay_maay.first_atomic_nuclei_hydrogen_helium_li: Xudunta atomka ee ugu horreeyay: hydrogen, helium, lithium
maay_maay.first_atoms_cmb_photons_released: Atomyadii ugu horreeyay; photon-yada CMB waa la sii daayay
maay_maay.no_stars_mostly_neutral_hydrogen_dark_: Xiddigo ma jirin; inta badan hydrogen neutral ah + dark matter
maay_maay.population_iii_stars_massive_short_liv: Xiddigaha Population III: cuf badan, nolol gaaban
maay_maay.mergers_create_the_first_galaxy_seeds: Isku darsanaantu waxay abuurtay abuurkii galaxy-ga ugu horreeyay
maay_maay.most_galaxies_assembled_star_formation: Galaxy-yada intooda badan waa la isku dhisay; samaynta xiddiguhu way heerkeedii sare gaadhay
maay_maay.our_sun_and_planets_accrete: Qorraxdeenna iyo planet-yadu way isu ururaan
maay_maay.expansion_accelerating_due_to_dark_ene: Ballaadhintu way dardar-gelaysaa dark energy darteed
maay_maay.the_universe_is_13_8_billion_years_old: Koonku wuxuu jiray 13.8 bilyan sano. Wuxuu ku bilaabmay culays iyo kulayl aan xad lahayn, kadibna wuu ballaadhay oo qaboobay. Galaxy-yadu waxay samaysmeen 1 bilyan sano gudahood, Qorraxdeennuna 9 bilyan sano, annaguna waxaan halkan joognaa 13.8 bilyan sano.
maay_maay.click_incoming_asteroids_before_they_r: Riix asteroid-yada soo socda ka hor inta aanay Dhulka gaadhin. Sida difaaca planet-yada ee hawlgalka DART ee NASA.
maay_maay.real_nasa_program_dart_double_asteroid: Barnaamij dhab ah oo NASA: DART (Double Asteroid Redirection Test) wuxuu si guul leh u beddelay wareegga Dimorphos 2022. Xafiiska Isku-duwidda Difaaca Planet-yada wuxuu la socdaa 30,000+ walxood oo Dhulka u dhow.
maay_maay.four_galaxy_morphologies_spirals_like_: Afar qaab galaxy. Spiral-yada sida keenna waxay muujiyaan gacmo raacaya samaynta xiddigaha. Elliptical-yadu way duqoobeen, irregular-yaduna waa qas.
maay_maay.bigger_aperture_gathers_more_light_res: Aperture weyn wuxuu iftiin badan ururiyaa + faahfaahin fiican muujiyaa. Magnification-ku wuu ka muhiimsanaan yaraa intaad u malaynayso.
maay_maay.aperture_matters_more_than_magnificati: Aperture-ku wuu ka muhiimsan yahay magnification! Objective weyn wuxuu iftiin badan ururiyaa + faahfaahin fiican muujiyaa. Magnification ka badan qiyaastii 20x sentimitir kasta oo aperture ah wuxuu keliya khiyaano keenaa. Muraayadda 6.5 m ee JWST waxay baartaa galaxy-yo laga soo bilaabo boqollaal milyan sano ee ugu horreeyay Big Bang kadib.
maay_maay.drag_the_altitude_slider_up_through_ea: Jiid slider-ka joogga kor ugu qaad hawada Dhulka. Cadaadisku wuu hoos u dhacaa, heerkulku wuu is-beddelaa, kiimikaduna lakab kasta way isku beddeshaa.
maay_maay.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Cimiladu halkan ayay ka dhacdaa. Heerkulku wuu hoos u dhacaa marka joogu kordho.
maay_maay.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Lakabka ozone wuxuu nuugaa UV. Heerkulku wuu kordhaa marka joogu kordho.
maay_maay.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteor-yadu halkan ayay ku gubtaan. Lakabka ugu qabow (-90°C).
maay_maay.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS halkan buu ku wareegaa (400km). Iftiinka aurora. Hawo aad u khafiif ah laakiin kulul.
maay_maay.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Xadka bannaanka. Hawadu bannaanka ayay u baxdaa.
maay_maay.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Waxa uu Galileo arkay 1610: Venus wuxuu maraa marxalado. Tani waxay caddaysay in Venus uu Qorraxda ku wareego, ee uusan Dhulka ku wareegin.
maay_maay.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Waxa uu Galileo helay 1610: Venus wuxuu leeyahay marxalado sida Dayaxa
maay_maay.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: 1610-kii Galileo wuxuu Venus ku eegay telescope-kiisa wuxuuna arkay inuu marxalado maro — sida Dayaxa. Tani waxay caddayn u ahayd in Venus uu Qorraxda ku wareego, ee uusan Dhulka ku wareegin. Nidaamka Ptolemy ee Dhulka dhexda dhiga ma sharxi karo Venus buuxa. Caddayn weyn oo taageeraysa heliocentrism-ka Copernicus.
maay_maay.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Beer birlabeed waxay iska celisaa dabaysha qorraxda + waxay ilaalisaa hawada. Mars labadaba wuu lumiyay; sidaas darteed wuu cidloobay.
maay_maay.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Beerta birlabeed ee Dhulku waxay iska celisaa dabaysha qorraxda intiisa badan, iyadoo ilaalinaysa hawada + nolosha. Mars wuxuu beertiisii birlabeed lumiyay ~4 bilyan sano ka hor si tartiib ahna wuxuu lumiyay hawadiisii. Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay beerta ugu xoogga badan nidaamka qorraxda.
maay_maay.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Beddel u dhexeeya aragtida cabbirka iyo tan masaafada. Labada isku mar cabbir dhab ah lagama tusi karo — sidaas ayuu bannaanku u yahay mid madhan.
maay_maay.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Cabbirrada dhabta ah isku mar way adag tahay in la tuso. Haddii Dhulku uu digir yahay, Qorraxdu waxay noqon lahayd kubbad badeed oo 200 fuudh u jirta. Haddii masaafooyinku cabbir dhab ahaadaan, planet-yadu waxay noqonayaan barro aan la arki karin. Sawirrada intooda badan way is-dhaafsadaan.
maay_maay.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Isticmaal thrust si aad hoos u dhaca u gaabiso. Ka deg si ka jilicsan 2.5 m/s ama waad burburaysaa. Maamul shidaalka — kuma filna in aad si bilaash ah u taagnaato.
maay_maay.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 shidaalku ku dhowaaday inuu ka dhammaado inta uu Dayaxa ku degayay. Neil Armstrong wuxuu gacanta ku beddelay autopilot-ka si uu u helo meel degitaan oo siman. Degitaanku wuxuu dhacay iyadoo ~25 ilbiriqsi oo shidaal ah hadhay.
maay_maay.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Dooro meel + eeg inta ay iftiinku qaadanayo inuu gaadho. Nidaamka qorraxda ka baxsan, masaafooyinku aad bay u weynaadaan.
maay_maay.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Iftiinku wuxuu socdaa 300,000 km/s. Walxaha fog waxaan u aragnaa sidii ay ahaayeen markii iftiinku ka baxay. Qorraxda aan aragno waa 8 daqiiqo jir; Proxima Centauri waa 4 sano jir. Galaxy-ga Andromeda waa 2.5 milyan sano jir.
maay_maay.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Halkee ayay Qorraxdu ka soo baxdaa oo ay ku dhacdaa? Waxay ku xiran tahay latitude-kaaga + maalinta. Isku day Maine iyo Arctic Circle.
maay_maay.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Jidka Qorraxdu wuxuu ku xiran yahay latitude + xilliga. Dhexroorka, qorraxdu si toos ah ayay kor uga martaa. Arctic Circle, qorraxda habeenbadhka xagaaga solstice + habeen cidhifeed xilliga qaboobaha solstice. Portland ee Maine: xagaaga dhexdiisa qorraxdu way sarraysaa; jiilaalka dhexdiisa, qorraxdu ku dhawaad cirifka aragga ma dhaafto.
maay_maay.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Dayaxyada qaar waxaa laga yaabaa inay nolol hayaan: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede waxay leeyihiin badaha hoose. Hawlgallo firfircoon ayaa hadda raadinaya.
maay_maay.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Badda hoose waxay leedahay 2× biyaha badaha Dhulka. Hydrothermal vent-yo ayaa suurtogal ah sagxadda badda. Hawlgallada JUICE + Europa Clipper way socdaan.
maay_maay.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini wuxuu helay ilo buufinaya biyo + organics + hydrogen + silica. Kiimikada uumiga waxay muujinaysaa walxaha + ilaha tamareed ee nolosha taageeri kara.
maay_maay.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Hawo qaro weyn oo N2 + CH4 ah. Harooyin methane dareere ah oo dusha ah. Bad biyo-ammonia ah oo hoose. Nolol waa suurtogal laakiin aad bay u duwan tahay.
maay_maay.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Dayaxa ugu weyn. Caddayn xoog leh oo Hubble ah oo bad hoose muujinaysa. Hawlgalka JUICE ayaa baari doona.
maay_maay.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Dusha ugu duqowday ee la arki karo nidaamka qorraxda. Bad hoose ayaa suurtogal ah. Shucaac ka yar dayaxyada kale ee Jupiter.
maay_maay.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Jirka ugu foolkaano firfircoon nidaamka qorraxda. 400+ foolkaano firfircoon. Hawo sulfur dioxide ah. Lagu noolaan maayo.
maay_maay.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Maxaa loo baahan yahay in Mars lagu noolaan karo? Beddel gaaska greenhouse, dhalaalidda barafka, iyo daboolidda dhirta — daawo Mars oo isu beddelaya.
maay_maay.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Beddelidda Mars waxay qaadan lahayd kumanaan sano. Waxaa loo baahan yahay: hawada qaro weyneyn (gaasaska greenhouse), dusha kululayn (barafka wuu dhalaalaa), dhir keenid (oksijiin). Daraasadaha NASA waxay muujinayaan in kaydka CO2 ee Mars ee hadda uu aad u khafiifsan yahay in la beddelo iyadoo aan wax badan la keenin. Wali inta badan waa mala-awaal sayniseed.
maay_maay.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble wuxuu 10 maalmood eegayay meel cirka ah oo madhan wuxuuna helay 3000 galaxy oo fog. Si dhow u eeg — kuley kasta oo caadi ah waa galaxy.
maay_maay.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Kuley kasta oo caadi ah waa galaxy leh malaayiin ilaa boqollaal bilyan oo xiddig
maay_maay.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: 1995-kii, Hubble wuxuu 10 maalmood ku aaday meel yar oo madoow oo cirka ah. Natiijo: 3000 galaxy oo fog hal sawir. JWST wuxuu tan sii qoto-dheereeyay, isagoo baaraya galaxy-yo laga soo bilaabo boqollaal milyan sano ee ugu horreeyay Big Bang kadib.
maay_maay.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Xiddigaha kululi waxay u muuqdaan buluug; kuwa qaboobina guduud. Xiddigaha waxaa loo kala saaraa OBAFGKM sida nooca spectral.
maay_maay.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Red dwarf — xiddigaha ugu qabow + ugu badan (75% xiddigaha oo dhan)
maay_maay.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Orange dwarf — ka degganaan badan Qorraxda, nolol dheer
maay_maay.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Buluug — xiddigaha ugu kulul + ugu naadirsan, noloshoodu waa malaayiin sano oo keliya
maay_maay.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Midabka xiddiga = heerkul. Ereyga xusuusinta cirbixiyeenka ee taxanaha spectral ee OBAFGKM (ugu kulul ilaa ugu qabow): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Xiddigaha kululi way weyn yihiin + way dhalaalayaan + nolol gaaban ayay leeyihiin.
maay_maay.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Maxaa Dayaxu had iyo jeer isla weji u tusaa? Xoogagga mawjadaha ayaa wareeggiisa gaabiyay. Eeg sida masaafada + cufku u saameeyaan wakhtiga xirnaanta.
maay_maay.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Xoogagga mawjaduhu si tartiib ah ayay u gaabiyaan wareegga dayax ilaa uu la mid noqdo muddadiisa wareegga. Dayaxeennu wuu xiran yahay: had iyo jeer isla weji ayuu Dhulka u jeediyaa. Mercury wuxuu Qorraxda la leeyahay resonance 3:2 (dhab ahaan ma xirna).
maay_maay.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Riix god kasta. Saynisyahannada dhabta ah ee planet-yadu waxay godadka u tiriyaan si ay dusha u da'ayaan — god badan = duq.
maay_maay.click_craters_to_count_them: 🔍 Riix godadka si aad u tiriso
maay_maay.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Tirinta godadku waa sida saynisyahannadu ku ogaadaan da'da dusha planet-yada. God badan = dus duqowday. Buuraha Dayaxa god badan ayaa ku yaal (aad bay u duqoobeen); maria-du waa lava ka cusub.
maay_maay.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Cufku wuxuu qalloociyaa spacetime. Jiid cufka + daawo godka oo qoto-dheeraanaya. Gilgil kubbadda si aad u aragto sida ay u dhacdo.
maay_maay.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: Einstein general relativity wuxuu leeyahay cufku wuxuu qalloociyaa spacetime. Walxuhu xoog ma dareemaan — waxay raacaan geodesics-ka joomatari qalloocan. Kani waa gravity. Godadka madoow way sidii oo kale u qalloociyaan spacetime ilaa xataa iftiinku uusan ka baxsan karin.
maay_maay.asteroid_composition: 🪨 Waxa uu Asteroid-ku ka Kooban Yahay
maay_maay.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Saddex nooc oo waaweyn oo asteroid ah: C, S, M. Shirkadaha macdanta waxay indhaha ku hayaan nooca M ee bir + platinum.
maay_maay.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Kan ugu badan (75%). Madoow, hore, biyo badan. Waxaa laga helaa suunka dibedda.
maay_maay.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Dhagax ah (17%). Fudud, waxaa laga sameeyay macdanta silicate + bir. Waxaa laga helaa suunka gudaha.
maay_maay.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Bir badan (8%). Inta badan bir + nickel. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay ka timid xudunta protoplanet-yo burburay. Bartilmaameedka macdanta.
maay_maay.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Iftiin ka yimid 380,000 sano Big Bang kadib. Isbeddello aad u yaryar ayaa ah abuurka galaxy kasta.
maay_maay.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Is-beddellada heerkulka oo qiyaastii 0.001% ah — abuurka qaab-dhismeedka oo dhan
maay_maay.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB waa iftiin hadhay oo ka yimid 380,000 sano Big Bang kadib. Kala duwanaansho heerkul oo aad u yar ayaa muujinaya halka walxuhu wax yar ku culusaayeen. Barooyinka culusi waxay noqdeen galaxy-yada + xiddigaha aan maanta aragno oo dhan. Penzias + Wilson ayaa si shil ah u helay 1965 (Nobel Prize 1978).
maay_maay.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Giraangiraha Saturn waa 99% baraf biyo ah oo tirilyanaan qaybood ah. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay yihiin 100 milyan sano oo keliya.
maay_maay.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Giraangiraha Saturn inta badan waa walxo baraf biyo ah oo u dhexeeya xabbado boodh ilaa gooryaan guri le'eg. Waxay fidaan 282,000 km laakiin qaradoodu waa < 1 km. Waxaa laga yaabaa inay ka samaysmeen dayax burburay ~100 milyan sano ka hor — aad bay u cusub yihiin!
maay_maay.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Dooro xudun, dus, hawo, iyo nolol. Eeg nooca adduun aad samaysay.
maay_maay.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar-yadu waa xiddigo neutron ah oo wareega oo leh iftiin birlabeed. Dhulku wuxuu arkaa garaac keliya marka iftiinku ku dul maro.
maay_maay.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar waa xiddig neutron ah oo si dheereysa u wareega. Cidhifyadiisa birlabeed waxay soo saaraan iftiin shucaac ah. Waxaan aragnaa garaac keliya marka iftiinku na dul maro — sida nal badeed. Qaar waxay garaacaan 700 jeer ilbiriqsikii. Jocelyn Bell Burnell ayaa kii ugu horreeyay helay 1967.
maay_maay.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Socod walxo charged ah oo Qorraxda ka yimid, oo Dhulka ku dhaca. Dabayl xoog badan = aurora badan + carqalad GPS.
maay_maay.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Dabaysha qorraxdu waa socod walxo charged ah (inta badan proton + electron) oo si joogto ah Qorraxda uga soo qulqulaya. Xawaaruhu wuxuu u dhexeeyaa 250-800 km/s. Duufaanno xoog leh waxay keenaan aurora + waxay carqaladayn karaan GPS + shabakadaha korontada. Dhacdadii Carrington 1859: telegraph-yadu way birbireen oo way gubteen.
maay_maay.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS wuxuu Dhulka ku wareegaa 90 daqiiqo kasta. Mararka qaar iftiinka ayuu ku jiraa, mararka qaarna hooska Dhulka.
maay_maay.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS wuxuu ku wareegaa 400 km sare oo 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h) ah. Wuxuu dhammeeyaa hal wareeg 90 daqiiqo kasta — sidaas darteed cirbixiyeennadu waxay arkaan 16 qorrax-soo-bax + qorrax-dhac maalintii. ISS waa walaxda ugu weyn ee dadku bannaanka ka dhiseen.
maay_maay.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 waxaa la duuliyay 1977. Hadda waxay ku jiraan bannaanka xiddigaha u dhexeeya; Voyager 1 wuxuu heliopause ka gudbay 2012 Voyager 2-na 2018.
maay_maay.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Voyager 1 + 2 waxaa la duuliyay 1977 si ay planet-yada dibedda u baaraan. Labaduba waxay ka gudbeen heliopause (xadka dabaysha qorraxda) 2012 + 2018 — hadda waxay ku jiraan bannaanka xiddigaha u dhexeeya. Mid kastaa wuxuu sitaa Golden Record oo leh salaan + muusik ku socda shisheeye kasta oo helo.
maay_maay.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury wuxuu Qorraxda hortiisa maraa dhawr sano kasta. Daawo isagoo gudbaya — laakiin keliya adigoo isticmaalaya filter qorraxeed sax ah.
maay_maay.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Daawo keliya adigoo isticmaalaya filter qorraxeed SAX AH — WEligaa si toos ah ha u eegin!
maay_maay.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Marid waxay dhacdaa marka Mercury (ama Venus) uu dhex maro Dhulka + Qorraxda. Wuxuu u muuqdaa bar madoow oo yar oo Qorraxda saaran. Marista Mercury ee xigta: Nofembar 13, 2032. Marista Venus ee xigta: Disembar 2117 — dib uma dhici doonto ilaa 2125.
maay_maay.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault 1851 wuxuu caddeeyay in Dhulku wareego isagoo isticmaalaya pendulum weyn. Diyaaradda ruxitaankiisu si dheereysa ayay ugu wareegtaa cidhifyada.
maay_maay.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault 1851 wuxuu ku muujiyay wareegga Dhulka pendulum weyn. Diyaaradda ruxitaankiisu waxay u muuqataa mid wareegaysa sababtoo ah Dhulku hoosteeda ayuu ku wareegaa. Cidhifyada: 24 saacadood. Dhexroorka: weligeed maya. Maine: ~34 saacadood.
maay_maay.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Cidhifka waqooyi ee Saturn wuxuu leeyahay duufaan lix-gees ah oo sax ah oo 30,000 km ballac ah. Voyager ayaa helay 1981.
maay_maay.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Duufaanka Lix-geeska ah ee Cidhifka Saturn
maay_maay.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Astaan joogto ah oo 30,000 km ballac ah — in ka badan 2x dhexroorka Dhulka
maay_maay.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn wuxuu leeyahay duufaan lix-gees ah oo sax ah oo cidhifkiisa waqooyi ah — Voyager ayaa markii ugu horreysay sawiray (1981), Cassini-na wuu xaqiijiyay. Lix-geesku waa 30,000 km ballac wuuna joogto yahay. Maxay lix-gees u tahay? Qaabka jet stream-ka hawada + mawjadaha Rossby.
maay_maay.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Saacaddii asalka ahayd. Marka Qorraxdu cirka mareyso, gnomon-ku wuxuu tuuraa hoos wareegaya oo saacadaha calaamadiya.
maay_maay.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Saacadaha qorraxdu waxay ka horreeyaan saacadaha kumanaan sano. Marka Qorraxdu cirka mareyso, hooska gnomon-ka wuu wareegaa. Masaaridii hore, Giriiggii, Roomaankii, Shiineeskii dhammaantood waxay dhisteen saacado qorraxeed oo sax ah. Kuwa casriga ahi waa inay sixaan daylight saving time + equation of time.
maay_maay.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: 80 galaxy ayaa ku fidsan 10 milyan sano-iftiin agagaarkeenna. Milky Way + Andromeda waxaa laga yaabaa inay isku dhacaan qiyaastii 4-5 bilyan sano gudahood — daraasadaha 2025 waxay tirada dhigayaan ku dhow 50/50.
maay_maay.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: 2.5 Mly u jira — nagu soo socda!
maay_maay.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Kooxda Deegaanka — ~80 galaxy oo ku jira 10 milyan sano-iftiin
maay_maay.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Kooxdeenna Deegaanku waxay leedahay ~80 galaxy oo ay Milky Way + Andromeda ku badan yihiin. Andromeda wuxuu ku soo dhowaanayaa 110 km/s — isku dhac ayaa suurtogal ah qiyaastii 4-5 bilyan sano gudahood. Haddii ay dhacdo: galaxy-ga weyn ee Milkomeda.
maay_maay.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroid cabbirkee ayaa dila heerkee nolol ah? Barbardhig dhagax yar ilaa kan dinosaur-ka dilay.
maay_maay.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Galitaanka hawadu wuxuu burburiyaa dhagxaanta intooda badan ee < 5m. Chelyabinsk 2013 (20m) wuxuu jebiyay daaqadaha laakiin god ma samayn. Tunguska 1908 (50m) wuxuu simay 2000km² oo kayn ah. Chicxulub 66Ma (10km) wuxuu dilay dinosaur-yada.
maay_maay.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME wuxuu Qorraxda ka tuuraa bilyanaan tan oo plasma ah. Maalmo kadib, wuxuu keeni karaa aurora quruxsan + fashilka GPS.
maay_maay.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Coronal Mass Ejection wuxuu bilyanaan tan oo plasma ah bannaanka ku tuuraa 1-2 milyan mph. Wuxuu qaataa 1-5 maalmood inuu Dhulka gaadho. CME-yada xoogga leh waxay keenaan duufaanno geomagnetic ah, aurora dhalaalaya, waxayna carqaladayn karaan dayax-gacmeedyada + shabakadaha korontada.
maay_maay.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid-yadu waxay garaacaan wareeg joogto ah. Muddadoodu waxay muujisaa dhalaalkooda dhabta ah — cabbiraadda koonka.
maay_maay.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid variable-yadu waxay garaacaan wareeg joogto ah. Muddadoodu si toos ah ayay ula xiriirtaa dhalaalkooda dhabta ah (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Cirbixiyeennadu waxay cabbiraan muddada + waxay ku isticmaalaan si ay u ogaadaan dhalaalka dhabta ah + masaafada.
maay_maay.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Wareegyadu waxay u dhexeeyaan goobaabin ilaa ellipse dheer. Beddel eccentricity si aad u sawirto jidad planet u eg ama comet u eg.
maay_maay.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eccentricity-ga wareeggu wuxuu ka bilaabmaa 0 (goobaabin sax ah) ilaa 1 (bixitaan parabolic ah). Planet-yadu ku dhowaad waa goobaabin. Comet-yadu aad bay ukun ugu eg yihiin — waxay Qorraxda u soo dhowaadaan + way u fogaadaan nidaamka dibedda. Wareegyada hyperbolic (e>1) waxay ka dhigan yihiin marid hal mar ah oo nidaamka qorraxda ah.
maay_maay.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Hawada Dhulku waxay xannibtaa wavelength badan. Iftiinka la arki karo, raadiyaha, iyo daaqado infrared ah qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha.
maay_maay.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Iftiinka la arki karo, mawjadaha raadiyaha, iyo infrared qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha
maay_maay.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Hawada Dhulku waxay xannibtaa wavelength badan. Iftiinka la arki karo, raadiyaha, iyo daaqado infrared ah qaar ayaa dhulka gaadha; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, iyo infrared badan waxay u baahan yihiin goobo indho-indhayn oo bannaanka ku sugan sida Hubble, JWST, Chandra, iyo Fermi.
maay_maay.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spectra-du waxay muujiyaan heerkulka, waxa uu ka kooban yahay, dhaqdhaqaaqa, iyo tilmaamo ku saabsan marxaladda horumarka walaxda.
maay_maay.cool_giant_atmosphere_4000_k: Hawada xiddiga weyn ee qabow: qiyaastii 4,000 K
maay_maay.excited_gas_10000_k: Gaas kacsan: caadi ahaan qiyaastii 10,000 K
maay_maay.key_visible_features: Astaamaha muhiimka ah ee la arki karo:
maay_maay.spectral_line_strength_caution: Xoogga xarriiqdu ma aha cabbir fudud oo badnaanta ah: heerkulka, culayska, iyo ionization-ka ayaa sidoo kale go'aamiya astaamaha ugu xoogga badan ee muuqda. Qalloocyadan waa moodelo waxbarasho oo la fududeeyay.
maay_maay.spectra_life_paths_note: Tusaalayaashani ma aha hal taariikh: xiddig Qorrax u eg wuxuu noqon karaa xiddig guduudan weyn iyo planetary nebula, halka supernova Nooca II uu dhammeeyo nolosha xiddig cuf weyn.
maay_maay.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Dhulku wuxuu wareegaa 15° saacaddii. Daawo marka ay duhur tahay Tokyo, iyo marka qorraxdu ka soo baxdo Portland.
maay_maay.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Dhulku wuxuu wareegaa 15° saacaddii. UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) waa tixraaca caalamiga ah. Aagagga wakhtigu waxay ku kala duwan yihiin ±saacado. Portland Maine waa UTC-5 (EST) ama UTC-4 (EDT). Caalamka, badhka Dhulku waa iftiin halka badhka kalena uu habeen yahay.
maay_maay.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Riix 12 xaqiiqo cirbixiyeenimo oo dareenka ka hor imanaya.
maay_maay.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Sawirrada buugaagta waa been. Dayaxu wuu ka fog yahay sida loo sawiray. Eeg cabbirka dhabta ah.
maay_maay.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Buugaagta intooda badan waxay Dayaxa u sawiraan mid aad u weyn + aad u dhow. Runta: dhexroorka Dayaxu waa 1/4 kan Dhulka, masaafada Dayaxuna waa ~30 dhexroor Dhul. Iftiinku wuxuu qaataa 1.3 ilbiriqsi safarka.
maay_maay.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay maalinta ugu gaaban (10 saac). Venus wuxuu leeyahay tan ugu dheer (243 maalmood Dhul ah!).
maay_maay.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter si dheereysa ayuu u wareegaa. Venus wuxuu ka gaabis badan yahay sanadkiisa.
maay_maay.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Gas giant-yadu si dheereysa ayay u wareegaan sababtoo ah sidii ay u samaysmeen. Venus ayaa ugu gaabis badan, waxaa laga yaabaa mawjadaha qorraxda + jiidashada hawada qaro weyn. Dhulku wuxuu hoos u dhacaa ~1.7 milliseconds qarni kasta gravity-ga Dayaxa darteed.
maay_maay.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Qorrax-madoobaadyada buuxa waxay daboolaan xarriiqyo cidhiidhi ah. Jidka qorrax-madoobaadka 2024 wuxuu ka gudbay waqooyiga Maine.
maay_maay.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Qorrax-madoobaadyada buuxa waxay dhacaan keliya jidad cidhiidhi ah oo ~100-150 km ballac ah. Qorrax-madoobaadka Abriil 8, 2024 wuxuu ka gudbay waqooyiga Maine — dad badan oo reer Maine ah ayaa waqooyi u safray si ay buuxnaanta u arkaan. Qorrax-madoobaadka buuxa ee xiga ee Maine laga arki karo: Maajo 1, 2079.
maay_maay.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalandarka Koonka ee Sagan: 13.8 bilyan sano oo hal sano ah. Dadku waxay yimaadaan ilbiriqsigii ugu dambeeyay.
maay_maay.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalandarka Koonka ee Carl Sagan: wuxuu 13.8 bilyan sano ku soo koobaa 1 sano. Big Bang = Jan 1. Hadda = Dis 31 habeenbadhka. Dadku waxay muuqdeen ilbiriqsiyadii ugu dambeeyay. Ilbaxnimooyinku waxay ku jiraan jajabkii ugu dambeeyay ee ilbiriqsi.
maay_maay.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Immisa ilbaxnimo shisheeye ah? Beddel arrin kasta oo aan la garanayn + eeg jawaabta.
maay_maay.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Tirada lagu noolaan karo nidaam kasta
maay_maay.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake 1961: qiyaasidda ilbaxnimooyin kale. Arrimaha intooda badan lama garanayo — jawaabuhu waxay u dhexeeyaan <1 (keligeen) ilaa malaayiin. Waxay muujisaa waxa aan garanayn in ka badan inta ay jawaab bixiso. Beddel slider-yada si aad u aragto sida natiijadu u dareensan tahay.
maay_maay.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Laba iyo toban telescope oo ugu waaweyn + ugu wanaagsan: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, iyo waxa ay eegaan.
maay_maay.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telescope bannaan oo Optical/UV/IR ah. 30+ sano oo adeeg ah.
maay_maay.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telescope bannaan oo infrared ah. Wuxuu ku yaal Lagrange point L2.
maay_maay.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Laba telescope oo 10m ah oo ku yaal Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
maay_maay.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO Chile, afar telescope oo 8.2m ah.
maay_maay.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Laba 8m ah: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
maay_maay.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telescope bannaan oo Optical/UV/IR ah. Wali wuu shaqaynayaa.
maay_maay.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telescope bannaan oo X-ray ah oo NASA leedahay.
maay_maay.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telescope bannaan oo infrared ah, waxaa la hakiyay 2020.
maay_maay.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Mid Japan ah oo 8.2m ah oo ku yaal Mauna Kea.
maay_maay.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telescope raadiye ah oo mustaqbalka, Australia + Koonfur Afrika.
maay_maay.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telescope ESO ah oo 39m ah oo soo socda. Chile.
maay_maay.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Laba iyo toban telescope oo ugu awoodda badan adduunka. Aperture (cm) waa dhexroorka muraayadda koowaad. Aperture weyn = iftiin badan + faahfaahin fiican. Telescope-yada bannaanku waxay ka fogaadaan qalloocinta hawada.
maay_maay.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Xiddigaha cufka badani si dheereysa ayay u noolaadaan + yaraan bay u dhintaan. Beddel cufka + eeg inta uu xiddigu gubanayo.
maay_maay.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Xiddigaha cufka badani si dheereysa ayay shidaalka u gubaan. Dhererka nolosha ∝ M^-2.5. Qorrax: 10 Gyr (badhkeenna ayaan joognaa). 10 M☉: 30 Myr oo keliya. Red dwarf 0.1 M☉: tirilyanaan sano.
maay_maay.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: La soco horumarkaaga: planet-yada aad sahantay, dhibcaha aad heshay, hawlgallada aad qortay.
maay_maay.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Qalabkani wuxuu leeyahay 35+ qalab-yar oo la isticmaali karo oo daboolaya cirbixiyeenimada, physics-ka, iyo sahminta. Laga bilaabo godadka madoow ilaa duulista degidda Dayaxa, waxaad sahmin kartaa Nidaamka Qorraxda iyo waxa ka baxsan.
maay_maay.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: 16 marxaladood laga bilaabo cirbixiyeenimadii Giriigga ilaa JWST. Magacyo aad tahay inaad ogaato.
maay_maay.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Safar 2300 sano ah oo laga bilaabo Aristarchus ilaa JWST. Helitaan kastaa wuxuu ku dul dhisay kii ka horreeyay. Sayniska waa tartan relay ah — cirbixiyeen kastaa wuxuu ku taagan yahay garbaha kuwii ka horreeyay.
maay_maay.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Barbardhig fasallada heerkulka dusha iyo raadadka spectral ee qeexaya.
maay_maay.spectral_class_size_caution: Cabbirrada goobaabinta si ula kac ah ayaa loo siman yahay. Fasalka spectral wuxuu qeexayaa heerkulka iyo qaababka xarriiqaha, ee ma aha dhexroorka ama dhalaalka keligiis; fasalka dhalaalka V wuxuu ka dhigan yahay main sequence, III wuxuu ka dhigan yahay giant, I-na supergiant.
maay_maay.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Isla xarafku wuxuu daboolayaa xiddigo aad u kala duwan: Proxima Centauri waa M dwarf, halka Betelgeuse uu yahay M supergiant. Qorraxdu waa G2 V.
maay_maay.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars wuxuu leeyahay hawo 100× khafiif ah oo inta badan CO₂ ah. Barbardhig waxa uu gaasku ka kooban yahay + cadaadiska.
maay_maay.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Hawada Mars waa 100× ka khafiifsan tan Dhulka. Waxa uu ka kooban yahay: 95% CO₂. Si aad Mars ugu neefsato waxaad u baahan lahayd oksijiin + cadaadis 100× ka badan. Ku dhowaad nitrogen looma haysto bacriminta.
maay_maay.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: 10 eray oo lagama maarmaan ah oo god madoow: event horizon, singularity, spaghettification, Hawking radiation.
maay_maay.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope wuxuu qaaday sawirkii ugu horreeyay ee godka madoow ee M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Giraangirta oranji ah = iftiin ku qalloocay kubbad madoow oo iftiinku ka baxsan karin.
maay_maay.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Shan planet ayaa aurora leh. Kan Dhulku waa cagaar/guduud, kan Jupiter waa kan ugu xoogga badan, kan Mars-na wuu firdhisan yahay.
maay_maay.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Cagaar (oksijiin) + guduud (atomic O) + buluug (nitrogen). Waxaa si fiican loo arkaa cidhifyada birlabeed agtooda.
maay_maay.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Kan ugu xoogga badan nidaamka qorraxda. Waxaa kiciya foolkaanaha Io + beerta birlabeed ee Jupiter. Aurora UV joogto ah.
maay_maay.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Waxaa kiciya dabaysha qorraxda. Midab yar oo ka yar kan Dhulka laakiin aad bay u weyn tahay. Waxay socotaa maalmo isku xigta.
maay_maay.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Jiho yaab leh janjeerta dhidibeed ee 98° darteed. Way adag tahay in la sawiro.
maay_maay.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Daciif — beer birlabeed guud ma jirto. Aurora-du waxay ku wareegsan yihiin birlabka diirka ee hadhay.
maay_maay.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: 10 hawlgal oo qeexay sahminta planet-yada. Laga bilaabo Apollo ilaa Cassini ilaa JWST.
maay_maay.first_humans_walk_on_moon: Dadkii ugu horreeyay ee Dayaxa ku socda
maay_maay.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Deggayaashii ugu horreeyay ee Mars + tijaabooyin nolol
maay_maay.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover tamar nuclear ku shaqeeya, wali firfircoon
maay_maay.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Sawirkii ugu horreeyay ee dhow ee Pluto + Arrokoth
maay_maay.first_planetary_defense_test: Tijaabadii ugu horreysay ee difaaca planet-yada
maay_maay.rover_first_mars_helicopter: Rover + helikobtarkii ugu horreeyay ee Mars
maay_maay.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Wuxuu Hubble ku dhammaystiraa deep field infrared ah
maay_maay.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Dhalaalka gadaal ayaa loo tiriyaa: yaraanta = dhalaal badan. Xadka la arki karo wuxuu ka kooban yahay 60 magnitude.
maay_maay.faintest_naked_eye: Kan ugu liita ee indhaha qaawan
maay_maay.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Magnitude-yada GADAAL ayaa loo tiriyaa: yaraanta = dhalaal badan. Tallaabo kasta oo 5 ah = 100× dhalaal badan. Hipparchus ayaa curiyay 130 BCE. Qorrax: -26.7. JWST wuxuu arkaa ilaa mag 34. Gaadhitaan: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ 10^24 jeer ka liita Qorraxda.
maay_maay.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Afar hab oo cirbixiyeennadu ku sharxaan booska cirka.
maay_maay.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Coordinate xiddig-ku-xiran. Right ascension (h:m:s) + Declination (°). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa buugaagta cirbixiyeenimada.
maay_maay.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Ku salaysan eegaha. Altitude (cirifka aragga ka sarreeya) + Azimuth (waqooyi laga bilaabo). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in telescope-yada la toosiyo.
maay_maay.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ku salaysan bannaanka Qorrax-Dhul. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa walxaha nidaamka qorraxda.
maay_maay.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ku salaysan bannaanka Milky Way. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa daraasadaha galaxy-ga.
maay_maay.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Cirbixiyeennadu waxay isticmaalaan nidaamyo coordinate ah oo badan. Equatorial waa mid caalami ah walxuhuna isla coordinate ayay haystaan inta Dhulku wareegayo. Alt-Az had iyo jeer wuu isbeddelaa marka Dhulku wareego. Galactic ayaa ugu wanaagsan barashada qaab-dhismeedka Milky Way.
maay_maay.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Laga bilaabo 1 Qorrax ilaa 10^22 xiddig. Cabbirka koonku waa mid la yaab leh.
maay_maay.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Cirbixiyeenimadu waxay ku shaqaysaa cabbirro aan macquul ahayn. "Immisa xiddig?" — ka badan xabbadaha ciidda xeeb kasta oo Dhulka ah. "Immisa jir?" — 13.8 bilyan sano. Haddana tirooyin qaar (uumi-baxa godka madoow) way ka sii weyn yihiin.
maay_maay.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: 36,500 walxood ayaa Dhulka ku wareega joogyo kala duwan. Dhaqaaji slider-ka joogga si aad u aragto waxa halkaas jooga.
maay_maay.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: 36,500 walxood oo la raadraaco + malaayiin jajab ah ayaa Dhulka ku wareega. Khatarta Kessler Syndrome: isku dhacyo isku xigxiga oo bannaanka ka dhigaya mid aan la isticmaali karin. SpaceX Starlink wuxuu leeyahay 5000+ dayax-gacmeed; wuxuu qorsheynayaa kuwo badan oo kale.
maay_maay.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Dhaqan kastaa wuxuu xiddigaha ku arkaa sheekooyin. Laga bilaabo halyeeyada Giriigga ilaa Emu-ga Cirka ee Aborijiniska.
maay_maay.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Sheekooyin ay dhaqamada adduunka oo dhan xiddigaha saareen. Emu-ga Cirka ee Aborijiniska Australia wuxuu isticmaalaa daruuraha boodhka madoow. Hagayaasha Polynesia waxay xiddigaha ku hagaan Pacific-ka iyagoo xasuusta ku tiirsan. Cirbixiyeenimadu sidoo kale waa sheeko-sheegis.
maay_maay.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: 5 hab oo cirbixiyeennadu ku helaan planet-yada ku wareegsan xiddigo kale. Transit + Doppler ayaa ugu badan.
maay_maay.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Eeg xiddig oo raadi hoos u dhac dhalaal aad u yar marka planet hortiisa maro. Kepler + TESS ayaa isticmaalay.
maay_maay.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Gravity-ga planet-ku wuxuu ka dhigayaa xiddigiisa mid ruxma. Ruxitaanka waxaan u aragnaa Doppler shift oo ku jira iftiinka xiddiga.
maay_maay.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Gravity-ga xiddig+planet maraya wuxuu qalloociyaa iftiinka xiddig ka sii fog. Masaafada kuma xirna.
maay_maay.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Xir iftiinka xiddiga + sawir planet-yada u dhow. Ilaa hadda waxay keliya u shaqaysaa planet-yada waaweyn/fog.
maay_maay.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Isbeddellada garaaca pulsar-ka waxay muujiyaan jiro ku wareegaya. Exoplanet-yadii ugu horreeyay sidan ayaa lagu helay (1992).
maay_maay.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet-kii ugu horreeyay ee ku wareegsan xiddig Qorrax u eg: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Hadda 6,300+ ayaa la xaqiijiyay. JWST wuxuu ku samaynayaa spectroscopy hawo exoplanet-yada — isagoo raadinaya biosignature-yo.
maay_maay.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Jadwalka madoobaadyada 2024-2079. Qorrax-madoobaadka buuxa ee xiga ee Maine: 2079.
maay_maay.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Qorrax-madoobaadyada buuxa waa naadir. Qiyaastii mid 18 bilood kasta meel ka mid ah Dhulka, laakiin mid kasta waxaa laga arkaa jid cidhiidhi ah oo keliya. Dayax-madoobaadyada waxaa laga arkaa dhinaca habeenka oo dhan.
maay_maay.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Kala-saarista Hubble: spiral-yo, elliptical-yo, irregular-yo + wax kasta oo u dhexeeya.
maay_maay.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Gacmo isku dhow, buurta dhexe oo weyn
maay_maay.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble wuxuu galaxy-yada kala saaray 1936 — "Hubble tuning fork." Spiral-yo + elliptical-yo + irregular-yo. Galaxy-yadu waxay ku horumaraan isku-darsanaan — Milky Way wuxuu ku jiraa nolol-dhexe; isku-darsanaan Andromeda ah ayaa laga yaabaa inay bilyanaan sano gudahood timaaddo (daraasadaha 2025 waxay tirada dhigayaan ku dhow 50/50).
maay_maay.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Laga bilaabo socod ilaa xawaaraha iftiinka (cabbir log). Voyager 1 waa walaxda dadku sameeyeen ee ugu fog waana mid ka mid ah probe-yadeenna ugu dheereeya, laakiin weli koonka ahaan aad buu u gaabis yahay.
maay_maay.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 wuu dheereeyaa marka la eego dayax-gacmeedyada hadduna waa walaxda dadku sameeyeen ee ugu fog, haddana wuxuu weli qaadan lahaa qiyaastii 80,000 sano inuu xiddiga ugu dhow gaadho. Iftiinku isla safarkaas wuxuu ku dhammeeyaa 4 sano.
maay_maay.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Daawo xiddigaha oo ka samaysmaya boodh qabow ilaa qorraxyo kulul. 6 marxaladood dhowr milyan sano gudahood.
maay_maay.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Xiddigaha waxaa lagu dhalaa kooxo ka soo jeeda daruuro molecular weyn. Nidaamka guud: dhowr milyan sano. Tusaalayaal caan ah: Orion Nebula (M42), Eagle Nebula (Pillars of Creation), Tarantula Nebula.
maay_maay.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: 10 ka mid ah su'aalaha furan ee ugu qoto dheer cosmology-ga. Qaar jawaab qayb ah ayay leeyihiin; qaarna waa qarsoodi kaliya.
maay_maay.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Shax degdeg ah oo astaamaha planet-yada ah. Dhexroor, gravity, dhererka maalinta, dayaxyo.
maay_maay.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Isbarbardhig dhinac-dhinac ah oo astaamaha muhiimka ah ee planet-yada. Dhul = saldhig. Qorraxdu waa qiyaastii 109x dhexroorka Dhulka (in ka badan milyan jeer mugga). Jupiter wuxuu leeyahay 115 dayax oo la yaqaan. Venus si tartiib ah ayuu u wareegaa oo maalintiisu way ka dheer tahay sanadkiisa.
maay_maay.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: 40+ qalab-yar oo muuqaal ah + la isticmaali karo. Waxaa loo sameeyay arday xiiseeya + dad waaweyn.
maay_maay.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: 40+ qalab-yar oo la isticmaali karo, muuqaallo SVG ah, iyo simulation waxbarasho.
maay_maay.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Laga bilaabo dial-ka marxaladaha dayaxa ilaa muujiyaha godka madoow ilaa pendulum-ka Foucault, qalab kasta waxaa loo dhisay in fikradaha aan taaban karin la dareemo + lagu ciyaaro.
maay_maay.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Waxaa loo dhisay K-12 + dad waaweyn oo xiiseeya. Fur qalabka oo dhan, ama mid keliya — mid kastaa keligiis wuu shaqeeyaa.
maay_maay.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Qayb ka mid ah AlloFlow STEM Lab. Waxaa lagu dhisay Maine, USA. Xogta oo dhan waxaa laga soo qaatay NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + ilo sayniseed oo dadweyne. Isticmaalka waxbarashadu waa bilaash.
maay_maay.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: 9 roob meteor ah oo sanadle ah + taariikhaha ugu wanaagsan ee la arki karo. Calaamadee kalandarkaaga.
maay_maay.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Roobabka meteor-ku waxay dhacaan marka Dhulku ka gudbo qashinka comet. Aragti ugu wanaagsan: meel madoow, Dayax ma jiro, habeenbadhka kadib. Perseids + Geminids ayaa ah roobabka sanadlaha ah ee ugu la kalsoon yahay.
maay_maay.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: 10 odhaah oo ka yimid cirbixiyeenno + safarradii bannaanka oo yaabka qabta.
maay_maay.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: 10 shay oo aad caawa ku arki karto indhahaaga keliya ama binocular.
maay_maay.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Eegista ugu wanaagsan ee indhaha qaawan: meel madoow (nalalka magaalada ka fog), Dayaxu cirifka aragga ka hooseeyo, indhuhu la qabsadeen (20-30 daqiiqo mugdi). App bilaash ah: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk waxay ku caawiyaan inaad garato waxaad aragto.
maay_maay.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Fikirka Carl Sagan ee ugu odhaah badan. Pixel ka kooban qof kasta oo aan waligeen naqaan.
maay_maay.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Meeshan fog laga eego, Dhulku wuxuu u muuqan karaa mid aan xiiso gaar ah lahayn. Laakiin annaga, way ka duwan tahay. Mar kale ka fikir bartaas. Taasi waa halkan. Taasi waa guriga. Taasi waa annaga. Korkeeda ayaa qof kasta oo aad jeceshahay, qof kasta oo aad taqaanno, qof kasta oo aad waligaa maqashay, bini'aadam kasta oo abid jiray, noloshooda ku noolaayeen."
maay_maay.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 wuxuu sawirkan Dhulka ka qaaday 6 bilyan km oo fog Feb 14, 1990 — codsi ka yimid Carl Sagan. Dhulku waa hal pixel. Bini'aadam kasta oo taariikhda jiray wuxuu ku noolaa pixel-kaas.
maay_maay.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: 8 walxood oo cirka qoto dheer ah oo caan ah. Xannaanooyinka xiddigaha, diirar xiddigo dhimanaya, hadhaaga supernova.
maay_maay.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Xannaanada xiddigaha oo 24 ly ballac ah. Waxaa lagu arkaa indhaha qaawan Seefta Orion.
maay_maay.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Waxa ka hadhay supernova la arkay 1054 CE. Wuxuu ku jiraa pulsar.
maay_maay.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Planetary nebula oo ku yaal Lyra. Diir dhalaalaysa oo ka timid xiddig Qorrax u eg oo dhimanaya.
maay_maay.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Guriga Pillars of Creation (Hubble 1995). Tiirarka samaynta xiddigaha.
maay_maay.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Planetary nebula adag. Lakabyo diir ah oo badan oo ka yimid garaacyo.
maay_maay.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Planetary nebula-da ugu dhow. Waxay u eg tahay isha bannaanka ku jirta.
maay_maay.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: Waxay ku taal Large Magellanic Cloud. Goobta ugu weyn ee samaynta xiddigaha ee la yaqaan.
maay_maay.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Hadhaaga supernova oo ~8000 sano jir ah. Qaansooyin waaweyn oo Cygnus ku yaal.
maay_maay.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Waxaad u baahan tahay si aad u bilowdo eegista — laga bilaabo app bilaash ah ilaa telescope-yo ku habboon miisaaniyad kasta.
maay_maay.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Software planetarium ah oo bilaash ah. Wuxuu ku tusayaa cirka habeenkii meel kasta, wakhti kasta.
maay_maay.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: App taleefan. Cirka ku toosi si aad u garato waxaad eegayso.
maay_maay.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Nidaamka qorraxda 3D ah oo la isticmaali karo + JWST + muuqaallada hawlgallada.
maay_maay.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Telescope-ka bilowga ugu wanaagsan. Wuxuu muujiyaa dayaxyada Galileo ee Jupiter, Andromeda, kooxda Pleiades.
maay_maay.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 ama Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
maay_maay.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE ama Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
maay_maay.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Magaalooyinka intooda badan mid bay leeyihiin. Xubnuhu telescope-yo way amaahiyaan, way baraan, xaflado xiddigo way qabtaan.
maay_maay.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Wad 30+ daqiiqo oo nalalka magaalada ka fog. Maine way ka buuxaan. Katahdin Woods and Waters waa hoy cir-madoobeed la xaqiijiyay.
maay_maay.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Qalabka ugu muhiimsan: cir madoow. Wasakhda iftiinku waxay tirtirtaa 90% xiddigaha. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM iyo AMC Maine Woods waa goobo International Dark Sky ah oo la xaqiijiyay; Acadia iyo Baxter sidoo kale waxay leeyihiin cirar madoow oo aad u wanaagsan.
maay_maay.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Aayaha xiddigu wuxuu ku xiran yahay cufka: brown dwarf, white dwarf, xiddig neutron ah, ama god madoow.
maay_maay.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Sida xiddig u dhinto ku dhowaad gebi ahaanba waxay ku xiran tahay cufkiisii hore. Xadka u dhexeeya xiddiga neutron-ka + godka madoow lama hubo (xadka Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ ee hadhaaga).
maay_maay.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Laga bilaabo 1km ilaa 93 bilyan sano-iftiin. Shax tixraac ah oo cabbirrada koonka.
maay_maay.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Masaafooyinku waxay cabbir ahaan boodaan: km ilaa AU ilaa ly ilaa bilyanaan ly. Tallaabo kastaa waa ~10,000-100,000× ka weyn. Cirbixiyeenimadu waxay ku nooshahay cabbir log ah.
maay_maay.maine_night_sky_by_season: 🌲 Cirka Habeenkii ee Maine Xilli kasta
maay_maay.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine waxay leedahay cirar madoow oo heer caalami ah. Waxa aad xilli kasta raadinayso.
maay_maay.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine waxay leedahay cirar madoow oo cajiib ah — gaar ahaan waqooyiga magaalooyinka. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM iyo AMC Maine Woods waa goobo International Dark Sky ah oo la xaqiijiyay; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, iyo Cobscook sidoo kale aad bay u madoow yihiin. Habeennada jiilaalku way dheer yihiin + aad bay u saafi yihiin.
maay_maay.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Hawlgallo iyo dhacdooyin waaweyn oo bannaanka ah 2024-2027. Waxaan ku noolnahay wakhti xiiso leh.
maay_maay.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Sahminta bannaanku waxay ku jirtaa soo noolayn. Waddammo cusub (Hindiya, Japan, UAE), shirkado gaar loo leeyahay oo cusub (SpaceX, Blue Origin), hawlgallo cusub (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Kor u eeg — oo fiiro gaar ah sii.
maay_maay.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Soo koobid tixraac degdeg ah oo waxa nidaamka qorraxdu ka kooban yahay + qaybsanaanta cufka.
maay_maay.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Qorraxdu waxay ku jirtaa 99.86% cufka nidaamka qorraxda oo dhan. Jupiter wuxuu qaataa laba meelood saddex meelood ee 0.14% hadhay. Dhulka + wax kastoo kale ayaa inta hadhay ah.
maay_maay.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Laga bilaabo Luna-deenna ilaa Triton + Enceladus. Qaar way ka weyn yihiin Mercury.
maay_maay.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Dayaxyada ugu quruxda badan nidaamka qorraxda. Qaar badan way ka weyn yihiin Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan waxay leeyihiin badaha hoose waxayna yihiin bartilmaameedyada ugu muhiimsan astrobiology-ga.
maay_maay.why_utc_matters: 🌐 Maxay UTC u Muhiim u Tahay
maay_maay.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Cirbixiyeennadu wax walba UTC ayay ku sheegaan. Sharraxaadda aagagga wakhtiga.
maay_maay.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) waa tixraaca caalamiga ah. Wuxuu ku salaysan yahay saacadaha atomka.
maay_maay.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Cirbixiyeennadu waxay dhacdooyinka ku sheegaan UTC si goobaha indho-indhaynta adduunka oo dhan ay isu barbardhigi karaan. SpaceX wuxuu ku duulaa UTC. Hawlgallada NASA waa UTC.
maay_maay.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) ama UTC-4 (EDT). London: UTC+0 (GMT) ama UTC+1 (BST). Japan: UTC+9.
maay_maay.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Talo: marka aad akhrido jadwal dhacdo cirbixiyeenimo, had iyo jeer hubi inuu UTC yahay mise mid deegaanka ah.
maay_maay.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC wuxuu beddelay GMT 1972. Wuxuu ku salaysan yahay saacadaha atomka ee shaybaadhyada qaranka ee adduunka oo dhan, oo celcelis loo qaaday. Ilbiriqsiyo boodis ah ayaa lagu daraa marka loo baahdo.
